Levels.postlearning: Postlearning snapshot: each X and Y face is shown once in a random order

Levels.violation: All faces were shown during violation events in session 1

pairmate.Description: A or B item within a pairmate; faces are neither an A or B

response_accuracy.Description: A participant's response is scored for accuracy. If no response was made, the value is NaN

response_time.Description: Reaction time. Time in seconds for participant to make a response since stimulus onset

repetition.Description: This trial is the nth time this image was shown across both sessions 1 and 2

pairID.Description: Pairmate number of the violated A-B pairing
